description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with clean lines and a flat roof. The exterior is primarily finished in dark and light panels, with large windows on the front facade and minimal window openings on the sides and rear. The front approach includes a wide driveway flanked by manicured hedges and palm trees, leading up to a raised entryway with steps. The landscaping around the house incorporates lush greenery, bushes, and a small garden area, especially on the side and rear. The structure appears to be two stories tall, with the upper level set back slightly from the lower, creating a tiered effect. The overall aesthetic is sleek and contemporary, with an emphasis on geometric forms and minimal ornamentation.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, dark and light panel exterior, large front windows, and landscaped surroundings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, wide driveway, manicured hedges, palm trees, and large front windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the tiered structure, garden landscaping, and minimal window openings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat roof, small windows, and dense greenery along the back and side.
description_view_3: Back view emphasizing the solid, boxy form, flat roof, and minimal exterior detailing with visible landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large front windows
attribute_entryway_design: Raised entryway with wide steps, minimal overhang, and flanked by hedges and palm trees
